core_principles: Frictionless Interface: Prioritize clear balances, 'Pay' buttons, and key data.
Mobile-first Layout: Emulate bottom-sheet style or clear vertical stacking even on desktop.
No Gradients: Flat, high-contrast UI for maximum trust and clarity.
Dynamic Theming: Must rely exclusively on provided CSS variables (--primary-* and --barColor).

component_guidelines.cards: Remove heavy dropshadows and gradients. Use solid bg-white, 1px solid border-slate-200, shadow-sm, and rounded-2xl.
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary actions use rounded-full, bg-[var(--primary-600)] text-white hover:bg-[var(--primary-700)]. Secondary actions use rounded-full, bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-200. Avoid ghost buttons for main actions.
component_guidelines.action_row: For the accounts page, use a row of circular icon buttons (w-14 h-14) with labels below them for Transfer, Deposit, Pay, etc.
component_guidelines.data_display: Use tabular numbers for balances. Group transactions by date (e.g., 'Today', 'Yesterday') using a clean list format rather than heavy tables.
component_guidelines.sidebar: Keep the left sidebar fixed on desktop with clean hover states (hover:bg-slate-100). Active state should use bg-[var(--primary-50)] text-[var(--primary-700)].
component_guidelines.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements must have semantic data-testid (e.g., account-balance, transfer-button, transaction-item-XYZ).

structure: Top Section (Hero): Breadcrumb/Back button, Account Name (e.g., 'Checking (...4920)'), massive Balance display.
Account Info Reveal: A subtle row showing Routing/Account numbers, masked by default, with an 'Eye' icon to reveal.
Quick Actions Row: 4 circular icon buttons placed horizontally (Add Money, Transfer, Send Check, Statements) centered under the balance.

Transaction History: A card containing a feed of recent transactions. Date headers (e.g., 'Feb 14, 2026'). Transaction rows with merchant icon/initials, name, category, and right-aligned amount (green if positive, black if negative).

dashboard.focus: High-level overview of checking, savings, and crypto.
structure: Bento-style grid of account cards. Each card acts as a large button navigating to the account detail.

landing_page.focus: Marketing page focused on trust and conversion.
structure: Hero Section: Dynamic, bold headline. Minimal text. Two buttons (Log In, Open Account). Image of app UI or person.
Features: 3-column bento grid highlighting 'No hidden fees', 'Early direct deposit', 'Crypto enabled'.

landing_hero.description: Woman using phone - great for landing page hero background or side image.

features.description: Phone used for contactless payment - for features section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Overhaul the entire app to remove all unnecessary gradients and decorative elements. Make it look like a highly functional, modern fintech app (like Chime).
Account Details Page is the primary target: Create a massive balance header, a masked account/routing number reveal section, and a horizontal row of quick action buttons (circular icons).
Replace Poppins with Manrope globally. Update imports and Tailwind config to support it.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and list items have descriptive data-testid attributes.
Do not hardcode primary colors; strictly use var(--primary-*) variables for brand coloring.
Transactions should be styled as a clean feed rather than a rigid table. Use color coding for amounts (green for deposits).
Use Shadcn UI extensively but customize the Cards to have shadow-sm, border-slate-200, and rounded-2xl.
